data.title: BNB Surpasses 830 USDT with a Narrowed 1.02% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Aug 15, 2025, 22:53 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 830 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 830.22998 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 1.02% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Hedge fund Brevan Howard becomes the largest IBIT holder with $2.3 billion worth of shares
data.description:
Brevan Howard has become the biggest shareholder of the BlackRock spot Bitcoin exchange-traded fund (ETF). According to a recent Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) filing, the hedge fund now owns around 37. 5 million shares of IBIT. This is worth around $2. 3 billion and represents a sizable increase since Q1, when the firm had only 21. 56 […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hedge-fund-brevan-howard-becomes-the-largest-ibit-holder-with-2-3-billion-worth-of-shares/

data.title: $48,930,711 in Crypto Assets Looted in Massive Exchange Hack As Stolen Haul Converted to Ethereum: On-Chain Data
data.description:
New data from the cybersecurity firm PeckShield reveals that tens of millions of dollars worth of digital assets were stolen from the crypto exchange BtcTurk. In a new post on X, PeckShield says that the Turkish crypto exchange platform BtcTurk has been exploited to the tune of $49 million worth of crypto assets, $38.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/08/15/48930711-in-crypto-assets-looted-in-massive-exchange-hack-as-stolen-haul-converted-to-ethereum-on-chain-data/

data.title: Cynthia Lummis Backs Budget-Neutral Bitcoin Reserve – Using Seized Crypto, Not Purchases
data.description:
Cynthia Lummis has supported Scott Bessent’s statement that the U. S. has said it will not buy Bitcoin for the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve, favoring a budget-neutral path using forfeited assets and a possible gold revaluation, as Bitcoin has hit fresh highs.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/senator-cynthia-lummis-backs-budget-neutral-bitcoin-reserve/

data.title: DeFi Development Corp Bets $273M on 110K Solana as SOL Per Share Skyrockets 48%
data.description:
DeFi Development Corp has bought 110,000 SOL for $22M, taking holdings to 1. 42M SOL and lifting SOL per share 48% over 30 days. The company has staked all new tokens across validators, reports Q2 revenue of $1. 98M and net income of $15. 4M, and has estimated a ~10% annualized validator yield.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/defidevcorp-bets-273m-on-110k-solana-as-sol-per-share-skyrockets-48/

data.title: Deribit Introduces USDC-Settled Options for BTC and ETH
data.description:
Deribit launches USDC-settled options for Bitcoin and Ethereum, enhancing stablecoin derivatives.
source: https://coincu.com/355166-deribit-usdc-bitcoin-ethereum-options

data.title: Fed Scraps Crypto Oversight Program After Trump’s “Debanking” Outcry
data.description:
With political pressure rising, the Fed has ended SR 23-7 and returned to routine review of bank crypto, stablecoin and DLT activities. Crypto oversight has continued under risk-based rules as FDIC and OCC have clarified custody, while ‘reputational risk’ has been dropped.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/fed-scraps-crypto-oversight-program-after-trumps-debanking-outcry/
